title: Senior Business Analyst zur Unterstützung der Digitalen Transformation
required_skills: Minimum 6 years IT experience (Business Analysis / Process Management / Agile PM)
Business process modelling (BPMN 2.0, UML, Use Cases, Epics, User Stories)
Experience in both classic and agile IT projects
Excellent German language proficiency (written and spoken)
Analytical and conceptual skills with structured working style
bonus_skills: Partial or full project leadership experience (Teil-/Projektleitung)
matched_skills: Partial project leadership (Strategy PMO at HSBC)
C-level data storytelling / executive reporting (partially maps to management decision papers)
missing_skills: Business process modelling (BPMN 2.0, UML, Use Cases)
6+ years in IT-specific Business Analysis role
German language proficiency (not stated in CV)
IT/business interface experience in IT projects
core_responsibilities: Act as bridge between business units and IT: capture, validate, and manage functional and technical requirements
Analyse and optimise business processes together with stakeholders
Plan and conduct requirements workshops; mediate between stakeholders to align on processes and requirements
Lead conception and elaboration of IT solutions, providing technical direction to project team members
Prepare management decision papers and take on partial or full project management responsibility
recommended_emphasis: Highlight cross-functional stakeholder coordination and mediation experience from Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC roles
Emphasise project management methodology exposure (Scrum, SAFe) to demonstrate agile familiarity
Showcase any business process analysis or requirements-gathering work, even informally
Stress C-level communication and executive reporting to align with management decision paper responsibility
If German language skills exist, make them explicit in the CV
